title: teline congesta
intro: Teline congesta, also known as Sticky St. Anthony's Turnip or Sticky Catchfly, is a plant species in the Caryophyllaceae family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Teline congesta include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Teline congesta is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
